serverInfo.name: secure-vault-mcp
serverInfo.description: MCP server for agent-native secrets management — store, rotate, and inject secrets without agents seeing raw values
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: store_secret
tools.description: Store an encrypted secret with optional rotation policy

tools.name: get_agent_token
tools.description: Issue a short-lived scoped token for an agent — agent never sees raw secret

tools.name: rotate_secrets
tools.description: Rotate all secrets for a service and invalidate old tokens

tools.name: audit_secret_access
tools.description: View who accessed what secrets over a time range

tools.name: scan_config_for_leaks
tools.description: Scan config text for exposed API keys, tokens, and passwords

tools.name: inject_secret_to_request
tools.description: Return a request with the secret injected — agent never handles raw value

resources.description: List all stored secret names with metadata (no raw values)

pricing.enterprise: $499/month — HSM integration, SSO, compliance audit logs
